content: If you are in emotional distress, struggling, or thinking about suicide, you are not alone. Free, confidential support is available 24/7. Canada Suicide Crisis Helpline, Call or Text: 988
Veterans & Military Support, Language Support, Deaf & Hard of Hearing Support are also available at 988
Youth & Young People, Online support and chat: https://kidshelpphone.ca
Indigenous Support, Hope for Wellness Help Line (Canada) Call or Chat: 1-855-242-3310. Providing support for First Nations, Inuit, and Métis individuals in times of crisis.
If you’re in immediate danger, please call 911.
If you are in emotional distress, struggling, or thinking about suicide, you are not alone. Free, confidential support is available 24/7.
National Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, Call or Text: 988, Chat: https://988lifeline.org
Veterans & Military Support, Call: 988 then press 1, Text: 838255, Chat: https://www.veteranscrisisline.net
Spanish Language Support, Call or Text: 988 and request Spanish.
Deaf & Hard of Hearing, Use videophone services or dial 711 (relay) then 988.
LGBTQ+ Youth Support (under 25), The Trevor Project, Call: 1-866-488-7386, Text: START to 678678, Chat: https://www.thetrevorproject.org
If you’re in immediate danger, please call 911.
